channel.title: Golang on Mike Ball
channel.description: Recent content in Golang on Mike Ball

item.title: Terraform Provider Development Demystified
item.description: An introduction to Terraform provider development patterns

item.title: Go Concurrency With Goroutines and Channels
item.description: An(other) introduction to Go concurrency, goroutines, and channels.

item.title: HTTP Middleware in Go with httptest.ResponseRecorder
item.description: A technique for creating Go HTTP middleware.

item.title: Channels in Go
item.description: A brief intro to Go concurrency through channels and goroutines.

item.title: Serialize Empty Structs to JSON in Go
item.description: How to avoid serializing an empty struct to JSON in Go?
